title: eleocharis neglecta
intro: Eleocharis neglecta, also known as dwarf spike-rush, is a type of flowering plant that belongs to the sedge family. It has been used in traditional medicine for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory and antimicrobial effects. The plant is believed to have various health benefits, such as reducing fever, treating respiratory issues, and acting as a diuretic. Herbal preparations of Eleocharis neglecta include teas, infusions, and decoctions, which are often used to treat a range of ailments, although more research is needed to confirm its effectiveness.
